pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 76 creates QCP with title='Cabinet Inspection', export_result.sh line 52 searches for this title, verifier.py line 50 validates it
setup_task.sh lines 35-40 create/retrieve partner with name='Gemini Furniture', export_result.sh line 62 searches for this vendor name
setup_task.sh line 45 searches for product with name='Cabinet with Doors', line 48 creates it if missing
setup_task.sh line 54 searches for stock.picking.type with code='incoming'; 'incoming' is the standard Odoo code for Receipts/inbound operations
setup_task.sh creates partner, product, and QCP programmatically via Odoo XML-RPC API during task initialization (lines 34-94)
setup_task.sh line 79 explicitly sets 'partner_id': False (empty) to match task goal of restricting vendor

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a Quality Control Point (QCP) titled 'Cabinet Inspection' in an Odoo 17 Quality module environment. The QCP is associated with the product 'Cabinet with Doors' and the 'Receipts' operation (operation code: 'incoming'). All data is synthetic, created programmatically via Odoo XML-RPC API during task setup. The setup script initially creates the QCP with an empty vendor field (partner_id: False), which serves as the starting state. The task requires the agent to modify this QCP to restrict it to the specific vendor 'Gemini Furniture'. Task parameters: 300-second timeout, maximum 30 steps, medium difficulty.
